text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and process images. One of its main tasks is image recognition, where a computer identifies what is in a picture, such as a cat or a tree. Object detection goes further, not only recognising objects but also finding their exact location within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other cars on the road. This allows the car to make safe driving decisions. Overall, computer vision is changing how machines interact with the world.
